allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\('c:/Users/physi/ECGenius-Ontology-CDSS/59d44cec-f41f-4c1a-82d5-06827db1458a.jsonl', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: lines = f.readlines\(\) print\(f'Total lines: {len\(lines\)}'\) for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): try: obj = json.loads\(line\) t = obj.get\('type',''\) if t in ['human','assistant','summary','ai-title','last-prompt']: print\(f'Line {i}: type={t}'\) except: pass ")
